The command failed due to formatting issues. Let me parse the results:
## Make fast-ci Results

**Ruff (Linting)**: PASSED - All checks passed
**Type Checking (ty)**: PASSED - All checks passed
**Prettier (Code Formatting)**: FAILED - File requiring formatting: - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/metadata_helpers.py` - Summary: 1 file would be reformatted, 1726 files already formatted

The pipeline failed due to **one formatting violation**:
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/metadata_helpers.py` **Issue:** Code formatting does not match Prettier style
All linting (ruff), type checking (ty), and tests passed successfully. The only issue is the formatting in `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/metadata_helpers.py` which needs to be reformatted with Prettier.
